channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pope Leo's AI encyclical says a lot, but critics say it misses the mark
item.description: The Pope's AI encyclical aims for AI to serve humanity, but achieving that vision remains challenging.

item.title: America's housing market decline is no longer just a Sun Belt story—LA and Dallas are tumbling, too
item.description: Price drops and broader geographic weakness have led a leading forecaster to slash its 2026 outlook.

item.title: As China bets its future on AI by cutting arts degrees, Jensen Huang says parents shouldn't worry about what their kids study
item.description: The Nvidia CEO said all the things that used to matter are still going to matter.

item.title: Major study of AI hiring tools finds 'clear racial disparities' — over 25% of Black applicants affected by bias
item.description: A Stanford-led analysis of 4 million job applications shows AI systems used by Fortune 100 companies systematically reject Black and Asian candidates.
